meaning: n.住在同一房屋的人,同居者
examples: A housemate of mine knew a woman who wanted to give away her baby.
My housemate Tommy Caplan was working in Kennedy's office, so I knew what was going on there.
You could also ask a spouse or housemate to remind you at, say, 10.30pm if you’re not already heading to bed.
She was the first housemate to be evicted from this year's Celebrity Big Brother.
He said the robbers knocked on the door of the house and rushed in when his housemate opened the door.
